creator: delphij@delphij.net
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi, Hartmann,

This is a known issue, the current version of OpenLDAP available from
ports tree does NOT support Berkeley DB 4.7.  I have a patchset that
updates OpenLDAP to 2.4.12 which adds BDB 4.7 support:

	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=128151

It is on hold waiting 6.4/7.1 to be released since this update would
cause a massive bump for OpenLDAP consumers for its bumped shared
library versions.

Cheers,
- --
Xin LI <delphij@delphij.net>	http://www.delphij.net/
FreeBSD - The Power to Serve!
